h1.visual_description: Large, bold sans-serif font, positioned at the top of the page, often accompanied by a distinctive cross-hair or 'L-shaped' graphic element consisting of a vertical and horizontal line intersection.

h2.visual_description: Bold sans-serif font, slightly smaller than H1, used for major section titles. In the TOC, these are underlined by a full-width horizontal rule.

h3.visual_description: Standard bold sans-serif font, used for sub-sections within the main flow (inferred from TOC structure).

visual_matchers.pattern: Intersection of a long horizontal line and a shorter vertical line in the top-left margin.
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Section Header Graphic / Page Start Marker

visual_matchers.pattern: Full-width horizontal grey/black lines separating text rows.
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Table of Contents Row Separator / List Delineator

visual_matchers.pattern: Short vertical tick marks intersecting horizontal lines on the right side of the page.
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Visual alignment guide for page numbers

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Numeric or Author-Date (inferred from formal report style)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Page numbers located at the far right of the line, aligned with section titles; graphic cross-hair elements in the top-left margin.
